title: Feathered: hard memory curation claim opened
body: Opened claim 0933f219-d404-4f6d-8f6e-15ec45adf028 for hard memory-surface curation on napkin, distilled, pending-graduations, repo-continuity, and the agentic-engineering thread record. Active claims and commit queue were empty before opening; no other agents present. Fitness is a routing signal only; no commits or quality gates in this pass.
